productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Checks  Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue, white and red check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding, and a curved hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Warm iron Bring the zing back to formal wear with this check US Polo shirt. The cotton fabric ensures optimal comfort while on duty and the fashionable design earns a definite fashion accolade. Pair it with formal trousers, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
